candidate_boundary: This is a content inventory of an explicit source snapshot. A dirty snapshot is not a commit, tag, published release, verification result, or readiness claim.

fixed_point_semantics.regeneration_property: For unchanged non-candidate source bytes, index identity, and pinned gitlink commit objects, regeneration is byte-deterministic and changes only the excluded candidate namespace.
fixed_point_semantics.review_boundary: Candidate output files are governed artifacts, not source files silently counted as reviewed.

inventory_policy.self_exclusion_reason: candidate artifacts cannot inventory themselves; artifact_manifest.json binds every generated candidate artifact

document.boundary: This source-controlled snapshot records only explicit non-promoting candidate progress. Its revision is a snapshot counter, not an append-only history. Empty arrays preserve the all-open, pending, NO_GO state; no status is inferred from source presence or local test output.
